name: Magadan Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the field, recalling the oblast's gold- and metal-ore mining
the waves of the Sea of Okhotsk in the arms
the wave crests in the arms

description: A red field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Magadan Oblast, depicting a stag standing above stylised mountains, sea waves and gold ingots.
history: Adopted in 2001 by the Magadan Oblast Duma; the design places the regional coat of arms on a plain red field.

features.symbolism: the red field of the oblast, recalling its gold- and metal-ore mining

features.role: coat of arms of Magadan Oblast
features.symbolism: an escutcheon featuring a deer atop a stylised landscape of mountains, sea waves and gold ingots, recalling the oblast's reindeer herding, maritime fisheries and gold-mining industries.
